vocab.meaning: một kênh giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Drawing serves as a vital creative outlet for me, allowing me to express emotions that are hard to put into words.

vocab.meaning: có tính trị liệu và làm dịu tâm hồn
vocab.example: I find the process of sketching incredibly therapeutic and soul-soothing after a grueling day at work.
Whenever I have a pencil in hand, I feel free to unleash my imagination and create entirely new worlds on paper.

vocab.meaning: khả năng quan sát chi tiết tốt
vocab.example: Drawing has helped me develop a keen eye for detail, making me much more observant of the world around me.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm/mê mải vào thứ gì đó
vocab.example: I often lose myself in the rhythm of shading and highlighting, completely losing track of time.

vocab.meaning: mài giũa kỹ năng nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I try to set aside time every weekend to hone my artistic skills and experiment with different mediums like charcoal.

vocab.meaning: sức hấp dẫn về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to botanical illustrations because of their delicate lines and timeless aesthetic appeal.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên một cảm giác gì đó
vocab.example: My sketches of old street corners are intended to evoke a sense of nostalgia and quiet tranquility.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác đạt được thành tựu sâu sắc
vocab.example: Completing a detailed portrait gives me a profound sense of accomplishment that boosts my mental well-being.
While I may not have been born with much natural artistic flair, I believe that persistence is more important than innate talent.
